metadata.title: SOM | Modern Elixir From Ancient Core
metadata.description: Functional daily elixir for peak mental focus and physical stamina. Crafted from natural origins to deliver high-level cognitive performance.

PROVIDES MENTAL FOCUS,CLARITY, AND SHARPNESS FOR THE MODERN HUMAN

Performance is Culture 

ANCIENTWISDOM

SŌM is inspired by the ancient SOMA — a sacred elixir known to bring vitality and a higher State of Mind. We've traveled from the heart of the Amazon to modern labs to bottle this essence for the modern human.
